aboutContent.headline: I build systems people trust.
aboutContent.subline: Lead full stack engineer focused on resilient platforms, clear product outcomes, and teams that move fast without breaking quality.
aboutContent.bioShort: I work across frontend, backend, and platform architecture to turn complex business goals into stable, maintainable software. I enjoy owning ambiguous problems, shaping practical technical direction, and helping teams execute with confidence.
aboutContent.locationLine: Based in Los Angeles, collaborating globally.
principles: Favor observability and reliability from day one
Keep users and teammates in the loop

cards.title: Systems Architect
cards.body: From APIs to UI state boundaries, I design systems that scale cleanly and stay understandable months later.

cards.title: Product Builder
cards.body: I turn vague requirements into shipped features with measurable impact, balancing speed, quality, and maintainability.

cards.title: Technical Leader
cards.body: I mentor engineers through architecture, debugging, and delivery practices that raise the baseline for the whole team.

cards.title: Performance & Reliability
cards.body: I care deeply about production behavior: instrumentation, bottleneck removal, and systems that stay calm under load.
